problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
